title: GoalOS Signoff Product & Protocol Ladder
headline: Know when AI work is actually done.
core_positioning: Define the brief, verify the evidence, obtain approval, issue a Mission Receipt, and optionally move toward proof-to-payment.

product_tiers.name: Signoff Basic
product_tiers.customer_view: No wallet; define done, submit evidence, review, and issue a signed receipt.
product_tiers.protocol_view: Protocol-compatible Evidence Docket and receipt; no public chain transaction required.
product_tiers.agialpha: None required for launch; can be sponsored later.

product_tiers.name: Signoff Verified
product_tiers.customer_view: Receipt hashes can be anchored; the customer sees a verified receipt, not token plumbing.
product_tiers.protocol_view: Commitment, artifact, evidence docket, proof bundle, proof card, and credential rails become relevant.
product_tiers.agialpha: Small protocol usage or credential fee can be sponsored.
product_tiers.status: Sepolia/testnet then gated Mainnet hash anchoring

product_tiers.name: Signoff Secured
product_tiers.customer_view: Accountable reviewer, challenge window, reputation, and slashing-ready discipline.
product_tiers.protocol_view: Reviewer/evaluator staking, attestation, selection gate, replay, claim-boundary, falsification, and slashing rails.
product_tiers.status: Requires audits, remediation, and explicit authorization

product_tiers.name: Signoff & Settle
product_tiers.customer_view: Payment releases only after accepted proof and challenge rules.
product_tiers.protocol_view: Job, vault, reward, treasury, dispute, appeal, and chronicle rails orchestrate proof-to-payment.
product_tiers.agialpha: Settlement, work rewards, proof rewards, reviewer rewards, stake, challenge, and treasury routing.
product_tiers.status: Future gated production tier; no user funds until authorized

public_boundary: No text inputs on public site
